name: MyTravel - AI Itinerary
subtitle: AI-Powered Trip Planning Made Easy
description:
Plan your personalized trip with MyTravel!

Let AI create personalized travel itineraries tailored to your preferences. Just enter your destination, dates, and budget — and AI generates a tailored travel plan for you.

Key Features:
- AI-powered custom itinerary generation
- Manual trip planning mode
- Real-time weather info & time zone tracking
- Expense management with split billing
- Offline mode support
- Trip photo gallery
- Social features: share trips, follow travelers, like posts
- Dark mode support
- Available in 17 languages

Start your smart travel journey with MyTravel.
releaseNotes:
v1.0 Official Launch
- AI-powered custom itinerary generation
- 17 language support (KO/EN/JA/ZH/ES/DE/FR/TH/VI/PT/AR/ID/HI/IT/RU/TR/MS)
- Social features (trip sharing, follow)
- Expense management with split billing
